testcase.name: TestEntityEnterView

failure.message: F:\work\mmorpg\cpp\tests\aoi_test\aoi_system_test.cpp:266 Expected: (it2) != (entitiesToNotifyEntry.end()), actual: 24-byte object <30-9B 6F-7B 30-01 00-00 00-00 00-00 00-00 00-00 90-0B 6F-7B 30-01 00-00> vs 24-byte object <30-9B 6F-7B 30-01 00-00 48-EF 15-20 18-00 00-00 90-0B 6F-7B 30-01 00-00> entity2 not found in entitiesToNotifyEntry
